fields.name: Indicate CB.1
fields.context: Subheading: Please indicate. This checkbox indicates if the patient is starting treatment.

fields.name: Indicate T.2
fields.context: Subheading: Please indicate. This field captures the month of the start date for the treatment.

fields.name: Indicate T.3
fields.context: Subheading: Please indicate. This field captures the day of the start date for the treatment.

fields.name: Indicate T.4
fields.context: Subheading: Please indicate. This field captures the year of the start date for the treatment.

fields.name: Indicate CB.5
fields.context: Subheading: Please indicate. This checkbox indicates if the patient is continuing therapy.

fields.name: Indicate T.6
fields.context: Subheading: Please indicate. This field captures the month of the last treatment date for continuation of therapy.

fields.name: Indicate T.7
fields.context: Subheading: Please indicate. This field captures the day of the last treatment date for continuation of therapy.

fields.name: Indicate T.8
fields.context: Subheading: Please indicate. This field captures the year of the last treatment date for continuation of therapy.

fields.name: Diagnosis T.1
fields.context: Subheading: F. DIAGNOSIS INFORMATION. This field captures the primary ICD code for the diagnosis.

fields.name: Diagnosis T.2
fields.context: Subheading: F. DIAGNOSIS INFORMATION. This field captures the secondary ICD code for the diagnosis.

fields.name: Diagnosis T.3
fields.context: Subheading: F. DIAGNOSIS INFORMATION. This field captures any other relevant ICD codes for the diagnosis.

fields.name: Clinical CB.0
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about using the drug in combination with other biologics or targeted synthetic drugs.

fields.name: Clinical CB.1
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about using the drug in combination with other biologics or targeted synthetic drugs.

fields.name: Clinical CB.2
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about the patient having received prior therapy associated with an increased risk of tuberculosis (TB).

fields.name: Clinical CB.3
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about the patient having received prior therapy associated with an increased risk of tuberculosis (TB).

fields.name: Clinical CB.4
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about the patient having had a tuberculosis (TB) test within 6 months of initiating therapy.

fields.name: Clinical CB.5
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about the patient having had a tuberculosis (TB) test within 6 months of initiating therapy.

fields.name: Clinical CB.6
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates that a PPD test was performed as part of the TB testing.

fields.name: Clinical CB.7
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates that an interferon-release assay (IGRA) was performed as part of the TB testing.

fields.name: Clinical CB.8
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates that a chest x-ray was performed as part of the TB testing.

fields.name: Clinical CB.9
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates a positive result for the tuberculosis (TB) test.

fields.name: Clinical CB.10
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates a negative result for the tuberculosis (TB) test.

fields.name: Clinical CB.11
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates the result of the tuberculosis (TB) test is unknown.

fields.name: Clinical CB.12
fields.field_label: latent TB and treatment for latent TB has been initiated
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates the patient has latent TB and treatment has been initiated.

fields.name: Clinical CB.13
fields.field_label: latent TB and treatment for latent TB has been completed
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates the patient has latent TB and treatment has been completed.

fields.name: Clinical CB.14
fields.field_label: latent TB and treatment for latent TB has not been initiated
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates the patient has latent TB and treatment has not been initiated.

fields.name: Clinical CB.15
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION. This checkbox indicates the patient has active TB.

fields.name: T11
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). This field captures the first name of the patient.

fields.name: T12
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). This field captures the last name of the patient.

fields.name: T18
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). This field captures the patient's phone number.

fields.name: T13
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). This field captures the date of birth of the patient.

fields.name: Clinical CB.19
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about diagnosis of moderately to severely active Crohn's disease (CD).

fields.name: Clinical CB.20
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about diagnosis of moderately to severely active Crohn's disease (CD).

fields.name: Clinical CB.21
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about the drug being prescribed by or in consultation with a gastroenterologist.

fields.name: Clinical CB.22a
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about the drug being prescribed by or in consultation with a gastroenterologist.

fields.name: Clinical CB.23a
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about the request being for initiation of therapy with the intravenous loading dose.

fields.name: Clinical CB.24a
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about the request being for initiation of therapy with the intravenous loading dose.

fields.name: Clinical CB.25
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about the patient currently receiving the requested drug.

fields.name: Clinical CB.26
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about the patient currently receiving the requested drug.

fields.name: Clinical T.16
fields.field_label: Please indicate loading dose at weeks 0, 4 and 8:
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This field captures the loading dose information if the patient is receiving it.

fields.name: Clinical T.17
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This field captures the maintenance dose information.

fields.name: Clinical T.18
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This field captures the frequency of the maintenance dose in weeks.

fields.name: Clinical CB.27
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This checkbox indicates 'Yes' to the question about whether the patient has received 12 weeks of therapy or less.

fields.name: Clinical CB.28a
fields.context: Subheading: G. CLINICAL INFORMATION (Continued). Crohn's Disease (CD). This checkbox indicates 'No' to the question about whether the patient has received 12 weeks of therapy or less.
